subject: Cumulative and Survival Distribution Functions
question: Let $X$ denote the age at death of an individual. The survival distribution is given by $S(x) = \begin{cases} 1, & x < 0 \\ 1-\frac{x}{100}, & 0\le x\le 100 \\ 0, & x > 100 \end{cases}$ (a) Find the probability that a person dies before reaching the age of 30. (b) Find the probability that a person lives more than 70 years.
